label: 2026 Orbital Launches
delta: 51st: Starlink 17-16 (Apr 26, 25 sats, B1088 15th flight, 50th Falcon 9 of 2026, OCISLY, 603rd booster landing). 50th: Starlink 17-14 (Apr 22, 25 sats, B1100 8th flight, OCISLY). 49th: GPS III SV-10 'Hedy Lamarr' (Apr 21, final GPS III constellation satellite). 48th: Starlink 17-22 (Apr 19, 600th booster recovery milestone).

label: Total Booster Recoveries (All-Time)
delta: 603rd: B1088 15th flight on OCISLY (Starlink 17-16, Apr 26, 193rd OCISLY landing). 602nd: B1100 8th flight (Starlink 17-14, Apr 22). 601st: GPS III SV-10 booster (Apr 21). 600th: B1097 7th flight on OCISLY (Starlink 17-22, Apr 19) — historic milestone, 10 years 4 months after first landing Dec 21, 2015.

label: Max Single Booster Reflights
delta: B1067 confirmed record 34th flight on Starlink 10-44 (Mar 30, 2026)

label: Starship Integrated Flight Tests
delta: IFT-12 ground milestones cleared: Ship 39 completed 60-second 6-engine Raptor 3 static fire (Apr 15); Booster 19 completed historic 33-engine full 15-second static fire at Pad 2 (Apr 16). IFT-12 firmly targeting May 2026.

label: SpaceX + xAI IPO Valuation Target
contestNote: Bloomberg Apr 2 reported target above $2T; Apr 24 analysis cites widening competitive moat (Starlink $15.9–24B 2026 revenue, Golden Dome contract, Cursor AI deal). Confidential S-1 filed Apr 1; $75B raise targeting June 2026 Nasdaq IPO. Public S-1 expected late April/May 2026.

label: Falcon 9 Cost per kg to LEO
contestNote: Depends on mission profile; Starlink internal pricing may differ
